# uptimekuma_notification_bale (Resource)

Bale notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_bale" "example" {
  name       = "Bale Notifications"
  bot_token  = "123456:ABCDEF"
  chat_id    = "111222333"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bot_token` (String, Sensitive) Bale bot API token
- `chat_id` (String) Target chat ID
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
